stimulus: Electrons in a betatron, a type of cyclic particle accelerator, travel in a spiral path of increasing radius until they ______blank the desired energy, at which point they are directed toward a target for high-energy collision experiments.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The present tense verb “attain” is consistent with the other present tense verb (“travel”) used to describe the electrons’ ongoing behavior.

Choice B (present progressive) suggests a specific moment rather than a general behavior. Choice C (past perfect) doesn’t match the general present time frame. Choice D (future) is inconsistent with the present time frame.
